body_storage_policy: public package source bodies are exercised in place by the organ acceptance command; this manifest binds their provenance and digest relation so old metadata cannot promote the organ by itself
receipt_body_policy: receipts are evidence outputs only and are not counted as imported body substrate
source_open_payload_boundary: non-secret Microcosm package source only; no provider state, credentials, sessions, raw private state, or release authority

modules.source_role: Organ wrapper that surfaces the capsule as a first-class organ: loads bounded fixture cases, drives the REAL capsule entrypoint route_catalog per case, compares observed routing status / top slug / score / matched note id against fixture expectations, self-falsifies on two planted no_match negatives via EXPECTED_NEGATIVE_CASES, and emits body-free result/board/validation/acceptance receipts. Mirrors the bridge_campaign_dag_validation contract exactly.

Public-safe source-faithful refactor of system/lib/annex_registry.py::route_annexes. Scores each annex in a sanitized catalog against a problem statement across four descending-weight evidence tiers (structured routing fields > family text > open-first summaries > curated notes), combining exact-match / phrase-containment / token-overlap signals per tier, then ranks non-zero rows and emits a per-row match_breakdown plus matched note ids. Returns status=routed when at least one candidate scores positive, else no_match.
required_anchors: Explainable tiered weighted-token retrieval over a sanitized annex catalog
Rank sanitized annex rows for a problem statement
